name: Sauteed Garlic Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet large enough to hold the potatoes in one layer.
3. Add garlic and sauté until just fragrant, about 1 minute.
4. Add potatoes and sauté golden brown on all sides, about 15 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with a little salt, cover, and reduce heat.
6. Cook gently for about 10 more minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove garlic and season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
